calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-31-2022 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-02-2022 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-25-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections and the matter being properly noticed, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated August 22, 2000 is admitted to probate. Douglas G. Moore is appointed as the Executor with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for May 31, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Isodor Bornstein is appointed Probate Referee. If a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will go off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
